# SealQ by QILI Electronics

## Company
- Brand: SealQ™
- Parent: QILI Electronics (七力电子), Zhejiang, China
- Founded: 2015
- Factory: 10,000 m², injection + assembly + QC in-house
- Exporting to 30+ countries

## Products
- PVS02 Handheld Vacuum Sealer: -60 kPa, USB-C rechargeable, 1200 mAh Li-ion, ABS+PC, CE/RoHS/FCC
- Embossed Vacuum Sealer Bags & Rolls: PA/PE co-extruded 7-layer, 90-110 microns, BPA-free, food-grade, FDA/EU compliant

## Wholesale Terms
- MOQ: 500 pcs (sealer); custom for bags
- Lead time: 7-day samples, 25-30 days mass production
- Payment: T/T 30% deposit, L/C for $20K+, PayPal/WU for samples
- Shipping: FOB Ningbo/Shanghai; DDP to Russia available
- OEM/ODM: custom color, logo, packaging, firmware; exclusive molds
- Warranty: 1 year, defect rate <0.5%

## Certifications
- CE, RoHS, FCC (standard)
- LFGB food contact for bags (on request)
- EAC for Russia/CIS (in progress)
- EU Authorized Representative, LUCID packaging (on request)

## Contact
- Email: jasonyuan866@gmail.com
- Sales: Jason Yuan
